name: Security Trust & Savings Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank in Storm Lake offering checking, savings, mortgages, consumer loans, and agricultural lending with 24/7 online banking access.
description_long: Security Trust & Savings Bank is a community-based financial institution serving Storm Lake and the surrounding agricultural region. The bank emphasizes personable, local banking relationships while offering a full suite of consumer and commercial financial services. Founded with a focus on serving local farms and agricultural operations, the bank has expanded to provide comprehensive personal banking solutions including checking accounts, savings products, home lending, consumer loans, and credit cards. The bank's service offerings span residential mortgages, home equity lines of credit for renovations and major expenses, consumer loans for automobiles and education, agricultural lending and leasing, credit card products, and online banking with bill pay capabilities. All deposit accounts are FDIC-insured, backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. Their online platform allows account access 24/7 with features including balance checking, fund transfers, loan payments, and bill payment functionality. Security Trust & Savings Bank distinguishes itself through its strong agricultural lending expertise and community-focused service model. Rather than operating as a large national chain, they market themselves as a personable local alternative with specialized knowledge of farm operations and rural financing. The bank offers free online banking enrollment and provides multiple contact channels including phone support at (712) 732-3022. As a traditional community bank, Security Trust & Savings is best suited for customers seeking personal relationships with local bankers and those with agricultural or rural financing needs. The bank's strengths lie in specialized agricultural lending and mortgage services, though specific rates, fees beyond the online bill pay feature, and product terms are not disclosed on the available website content.
services: Residential mortgage lending and home purchase loans
Bill pay service with optional fees
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full U.S. Government faith and credit
Free online banking available 24/7 with account access, transfers, and bill pay
Optional BillPay feature free for first 6 months, then $4.95/month for up to 10 transactions
Specialized agricultural lending staff for farms and operations with loans, leasing, and financing options
Home equity lines of credit available for renovations and major expenses
Can access checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, and loan accounts through online banking
Multiple loan products: residential mortgages, auto loans, personal loans, and home equity options
cons: Limited geographic service area focused on Storm Lake region, not a nationwide bank
BillPay fee of $4.95/month after 6-month free trial, plus $0.40 per transaction over 10
No specific information provided about interest rates, APRs, account fees, or minimum balances
Savings accounts limited to six preauthorized withdrawals or transfers per month
Account transfers made after 3:00 PM business day don't post until next business day
best_for: Local Storm Lake area residents and businesses seeking personable community banking
Farm owners and agricultural operations needing specialized lending and operational financing
Homeowners interested in home equity lines of credit for renovations
Customers prioritizing FDIC-insured accounts and local banker relationships
diagnosis: Security Trust & Savings Bank is best for rural and agricultural customers in the Storm Lake area seeking FDIC-insured deposits and specialized farm lending, or homeowners interested in mortgage and home equity products from a community-focused lender. The main caveat is that this is a regional bank with limited geographic reach, and specific pricing information including interest rates, APRs, and detailed fee schedules are not disclosed online.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
